title: How to fire a Webhook when clicking a Button Column?

posts.author: turboroof (Jorge)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to fire a webhook when a button column is clicked.
Is this possible?
I tried attaching an automation so when the Button column changes it should fire a webhook, but it sends all items instead of just the item that was clicked

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @turboroof,

Perhaps this webhook automation could be used with a checkbox column?

That way when the checkbox column is ticked or unticked, it’ll send a webhook notification.

-Daniel

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @turboroof,

The webhook automation listed above will work with both checkbox and status columns:

image776×405 19.2 KB

Hope this helps! Let me know if we can help with anything else.

posts.author: turboroof (Jorge)
posts.cookedHtml: yes thank you, it works as expected
